message.content:
Read these files completely and report their full contents back to me. I need every line — do not summarize or truncate:

1. `Tools/rbk/rbw-go.OnboardMAIN.sh` — triage entry point
2. `Tools/rbk/rbgc_Constants.sh` — constants (look for RBGC_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL and credential path patterns)
3. `Tools/rbk/rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh` — derived constants for credential path resolution
4. `Tools/rbk/rbga_ArtifactRegistry.sh` — GAR access functions

For each file, report the complete contents with line numbers.

content.text: I'll read all four files completely for you.

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle GCP Constants - Implementation (no printf required)
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)
25	test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
26	ZRBGC_SOURCED=1
27	
28	######################################################################
29	# Internal Functions (zrbgc_*)
30	
31	zrbgc_kindle() {
32	  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"
33	
34	  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
35	  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
36	  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
37	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
38	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
39	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
40	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
41	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
42	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
43	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
44	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX=10
45	
46	  # Global resource validation patterns
47	  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS
48	  # Depot:  rbwg-d-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
49	  # Bucket: rbwg-b-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
50	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
51	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
52	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_BUCKET_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
53	
54	  # Basic Configuration
55	  readonly RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
56	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
57	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"
58	
59	  # Service Account Prefixes
60	  readonly RBGC_MASON_PREFIX="mason"
61	
62	  # Timeouts
63	  readonly RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
64	  readonly RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
65	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX=7
66	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC=10
67	
68	  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
69	  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
70	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
71	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
72	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
73	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
74	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
75	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
76	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"
77	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER="https://secretmanager.googleapis.com"
78	  readonly RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
79	  readonly RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"
80	  readonly RBGC_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL="https://scaleinv.github.io/recipebottle"
81	
82	  # OAuth Scopes
83	  readonly RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"
84	
85	  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
86	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
87	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
88	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
89	
90	  # Email/Domain Assembly
91	  readonly RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"
92	
93	  # API Version Paths
94	  readonly RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
95	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
96	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
97	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
98	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
99	  readonly RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
100	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
101	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
102	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
103	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
104	  readonly RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1="/v1"
105	
106	  # REST Path Fragments
107	  readonly RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"
108	  readonly RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS="/locations"
109	  readonly RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES="/repositories"
110	  readonly RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="/serviceAccounts"
111	  readonly RBGC_PATH_KEYS="/keys"
112	
113	  # REST Operation Suffixes
114	  readonly RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
115	  readonly RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"
116	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX=":enable"
117	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES="/services"
118	
119	  # Operation Prefixes
120	  readonly RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL="operations/"
121	
122	  # Ark Artifact Suffixes
123	  readonly RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE="-image"
124	  readonly RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT="-about"
125	  readonly RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH="-vouch"
126	  readonly RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS="-diags"
127	
128	  # Fact-file filenames (written to BURD_OUTPUT_DIR by producers, read by tests)
129	  readonly RBF_FACT_HALLMARK="rbf_fact_hallmark"
130	  readonly RBF_FACT_BUILD_ID="rbf_fact_build_id"
131	  readonly RBF_FACT_GAR_ROOT="rbf_fact_gar_root"
132	  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_STEM="rbf_fact_ark_stem"
133	  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_YIELD="rbf_fact_ark_yield"
134	
135	  # Artifact Registry (GAR) Composition
136	  readonly RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX="-docker.pkg.dev"
137	
138	
139	  # Canonical Role IDs
140	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_READER="roles/artifactregistry.reader"
141	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_WRITER="roles/artifactregistry.writer"
142	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_ADMIN="roles/artifactregistry.admin"
143	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CONTAINERANALYSIS_OCCURRENCES_VIEWER="roles/containeranalysis.occurrences.viewer"
144	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR="roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor"
145	
146	  # Common API Base Paths (project-independent)
147	  readonly RBGC_API_BASE_GCS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}"
148	
149	  # Cloud Resource Manager - Liens API
150	  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_LIST_LIENS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
151	  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_DELETE_LIEN="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
152	
153	  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs (project-independent)
154	  readonly RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS="${RBGC_API_BASE_GCS}/b"
155	
156	  readonly RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM="linux/amd64"
157	
158	
159	  # Worker pool infrastructure (dual pools: tether + airgap)
160	  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER="-tether"
161	  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP="-airgap"
162	  readonly RBGC_WORKER_POOL_SUFFIX="-pool"
163	  readonly RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS="/workerPools"
164	
165	  readonly ZRBGC_KINDLED=1
166	}
167	
168	zrbgc_sentinel() {
169	  test "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgc not kindled - call zrbgc_kindle first"
170	}
171	
172	# eof
173	
174

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Derived Constants - Credential file path resolution
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	test -z "${ZRBDC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbdc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
25	ZRBDC_SOURCED=1
26	
27	######################################################################
28	# Internal Functions (zrbdc_*)
29	
30	zrbdc_kindle() {
31	  test -z "${ZRBDC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbdc already kindled"
32	  zrbrr_sentinel
33	
34	  # Ensure secrets directory and role subdirectories exist
35	  mkdir -p "${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_governor}" \
36	           "${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_retriever}" \
37	           "${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_director}" \
38	    || buc_die "Failed to create secrets directories under: ${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}"
39	
40	  # One-shot migration: move old flat rbra-{role}.env to {role}/rbra.env
41	  local z_mig_role=""
42	  for z_mig_role in "${RBCC_role_governor}" "${RBCC_role_retriever}" "${RBCC_role_director}"; do
43	    local z_mig_old="${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/rbra-${z_mig_role}.env"
44	    local z_mig_new="${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${z_mig_role}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
45	    if test -f "${z_mig_old}" && ! test -f "${z_mig_new}"; then
46	      mv "${z_mig_old}" "${z_mig_new}" || buc_die "Failed to migrate: ${z_mig_old} → ${z_mig_new}"
47	      local z_has_role=0
48	      local z_mig_line
49	      while IFS= read -r z_mig_line; do
50	        case "${z_mig_line}" in RBRA_ROLE=*) z_has_role=1; break ;; esac
51	      done < "${z_mig_new}"
52	      if test "${z_has_role}" = "0"; then
53	        printf 'RBRA_ROLE=%s\n' "${z_mig_role}" >> "${z_mig_new}"
54	      fi
55	    fi
56	  done
57	
58	  # Derive credential file paths from RBRR_SECRETS_DIR
59	  readonly RBDC_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE="${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
60	  readonly RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE="${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
61	  readonly RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE="${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
62	  readonly RBDC_PAYOR_RBRO_FILE="${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/rbro-payor.env"
63	
64	  # Derive full pool resource paths from stem (suffixes match RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER/AIRGAP)
65	  readonly RBDC_POOL_TETHER="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}/workerPools/${RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM}-tether"
66	  readonly RBDC_POOL_AIRGAP="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}/workerPools/${RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM}-airgap"
67	
68	  readonly ZRBDC_KINDLED=1
69	}
70	
71	zrbdc_sentinel() {
72	  test "${ZRBDC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbdc not kindled - call zrbdc_kindle first"
73	}
74	
75	# eof
76

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle GCP Artifact Registry - Implementation
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	test -z "${ZRBGA_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbga multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
25	ZRBGA_SOURCED=1
26	
27	######################################################################
28	# Internal Functions (zrbga_*)
29	
30	zrbga_kindle() {
31	  test -z "${ZRBGA_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbga already kindled"
32	
33	  test -n "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"     || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"
34	  test   "${#RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" -gt 0 || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty"
35	
36	  buc_log_args "Ensure dependencies are kindled first"
37	  zrbgc_sentinel
38	  zrbgo_sentinel
39	  zrbgu_sentinel
40	  zrbgi_sentinel
41	
42	  readonly ZRBGA_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbga_"
43	  readonly ZRBGA_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGA_PREFIX}empty.json"
44	  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGA_EMPTY_JSON}"
45	
46	  # Infix values for HTTP operations
47	  readonly ZRBGA_INFIX_CREATE_REPO="create_repo"
48	  readonly ZRBGA_INFIX_VERIFY_REPO="verify_repo"
49	  readonly ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO="delete_repo"
50	  readonly ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO="get_repo"
51	  readonly ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_GET="repo_iam_get"
52	  readonly ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_SET="repo_iam_set"
53	
54	  readonly ZRBGA_KINDLED=1
55	}
56	
57	zrbga_sentinel() {
58	  test "${ZRBGA_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbga not kindled - call zrbga_kindle first"
59	}
60	
61	######################################################################
62	# External Functions (rbga_*)
63	
64	rbga_repo_create() {
65	  zrbga_sentinel
66	
67	  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
68	  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
69	  local z_format="${3:-DOCKER}"
70	
71	  buc_doc_brief "Create an Artifact Registry repository"
72	  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository to create"
73	  buc_doc_param "location" "Location for the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
74	  buc_doc_param "format" "Repository format (optional, defaults to DOCKER)"
75	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
76	
77	  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
78	  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
79	
80	  buc_step "Creating Artifact Registry repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
81	
82	  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
83	  local z_token
84	  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
85	
86	  local z_parent="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}"
87	  local z_resource="${z_parent}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
88	  local z_create_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_parent}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}?repositoryId=${z_repo_name}"
89	  local z_create_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbga_create_repo_body.json"
90	
91	  jq -n --arg format "${z_format}" '{format: $format}' > "${z_create_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build create-repo body"
92	
93	  buc_step "Create ${z_format} format repository"
94	  rbgu_http_json_lro_ok                                              \
95	    "Create Artifact Registry repo"                                  \
96	    "${z_token}"                                                     \
97	    "${z_create_url}"                                                \
98	    "${ZRBGA_INFIX_CREATE_REPO}"                                     \
99	    "${z_create_body}"                                               \
100	    ".name"                                                          \
101	    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}"   \
102	    "${RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL}"                                       \
103	    "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"                               \
104	    "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
105	
106	  buc_success "Repository ${z_repo_name} created in ${z_location}"
107	}
108	
109	rbga_repo_get() {
110	  zrbga_sentinel
111	
112	  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
113	  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
114	
115	  buc_doc_brief "Get Artifact Registry repository details"
116	  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository to retrieve"
117	  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
118	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
119	
120	  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
121	  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
122	
123	  buc_step "Getting Artifact Registry repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
124	
125	  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
126	  local z_token
127	  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
128	
129	  local z_resource="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
130	  local z_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}"
131	
132	  buc_step 'Get repository via REST API'
133	  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO}"
134	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Get repository" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO}" 404 "not found"
135	
136	  local z_http_code
137	  z_http_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO}")
138	  if test "${z_http_code}" = "404"; then
139	    buc_info "Repository not found: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
140	    return 1
141	  fi
142	
143	  buc_log_args 'Verify repository format'
144	  local z_format
145	  z_format=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO}" '.format') || z_format="UNKNOWN"
146	  buc_success "Repository found: ${z_repo_name} (format: ${z_format}) in ${z_location}"
147	  return 0
148	}
149	
150	rbga_repo_set_iam() {
151	  zrbga_sentinel
152	
153	  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
154	  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
155	  local z_policy_json="${3:-}"
156	
157	  buc_doc_brief "Set IAM policy on an Artifact Registry repository"
158	  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository"
159	  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
160	  buc_doc_param "policy_json" "IAM policy JSON (from file or string)"
161	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
162	
163	  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
164	  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
165	  test -n "${z_policy_json}" || buc_die "Policy JSON required"
166	
167	  buc_step "Setting IAM policy on repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
168	
169	  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
170	  local z_token
171	  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
172	
173	  local z_resource="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
174	  local z_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}:setIamPolicy"
175	  local z_policy_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbga_repo_set_iam.json"
176	
177	  if test -f "${z_policy_json}"; then
178	    jq -n --slurpfile policy "${z_policy_json}" '{ policy: $policy[0] }' > "${z_policy_file}"
179	  else
180	    jq -n --argjson policy "${z_policy_json}" '{ policy: $policy }' > "${z_policy_file}"
181	  fi
182	
183	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" \
184	                                  "${ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_SET}" "${z_policy_file}"
185	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Set repository IAM policy" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_SET}"
186	
187	  buc_success "IAM policy set on repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
188	}
189	
190	rbga_repo_add_iam_role() {
191	  zrbga_sentinel
192	
193	  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
194	  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
195	  local z_member="${3:-}"
196	  local z_role="${4:-}"
197	
198	  buc_doc_brief "Add IAM role to a member on an Artifact Registry repository"
199	  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository"
200	  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
201	  buc_doc_param "member" "Member to grant role to (serviceAccount:email or user:email)"
202	  buc_doc_param "role" "Role to grant (e.g., roles/artifactregistry.reader)"
203	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
204	
205	  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
206	  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
207	  test -n "${z_member}" || buc_die "Member required"
208	  test -n "${z_role}" || buc_die "Role required"
209	
210	  buc_step "Adding IAM role ${z_role} to ${z_member} on repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
211	
212	  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
213	  local z_token
214	  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
215	
216	  # Extract email from member if it's in serviceAccount:email format
217	  local z_account_email="${z_member}"
218	  if [[ "${z_member}" =~ ^serviceAccount:(.+)$ ]]; then
219	    z_account_email="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
220	  fi
221	
222	  buc_log_args 'Use rbgi_add_repo_iam_role'
223	  rbgi_add_repo_iam_role "${z_token}" "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_account_email}" "${z_location}" "${z_repo_name}" "${z_role}"
224	
225	  buc_success "Added IAM role ${z_role} to ${z_member} on repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
226	}
227	
228	rbga_repo_delete() {
229	  zrbga_sentinel
230	
231	  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
232	  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
233	
234	  buc_doc_brief "Delete an Artifact Registry repository"
235	  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository to delete"
236	  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
237	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
238	
239	  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
240	  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
241	
242	  buc_step "Deleting Artifact Registry repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
243	
244	  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
245	  local z_token
246	  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
247	
248	  local z_resource="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
249	  buc_log_args "Delete Artifact Registry repo '${z_repo_name}' in ${z_location}"
250	  local z_delete_code
251	  rbgu_http_json "DELETE"                                                           \
252	    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}"    \
253	                            "${z_token}" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO}"
254	  z_delete_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO}") || z_delete_code="000"
255	  case "${z_delete_code}" in
256	    200|204) buc_success "Repository ${z_repo_name} deleted" ;;
257	    404)     buc_info "Repository ${z_repo_name} not found (already deleted)" ;;
258	    *)
259	      local z_err
260	      z_err=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO}" '.error.message') || z_err="Unknown error"
261	      buc_die "Failed to delete repository: ${z_err}"
262	      ;;
263	  esac
264	}
265	
266	# eof

```
    23	# Multiple inclusion detection

    25	test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"

    31	zrbgc_kindle() {
    32	  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"
    33	
    33	  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
    34	  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
    35	  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
    36	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
    37	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
    38	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
    39	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
    40	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
    41	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
    42	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
    43	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX=10
    44	
    45	  # Global resource validation patterns
    46	  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS
    47	  # Depot:  rbwg-d-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
    48	  # Bucket: rbwg-b-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
    49	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
    50	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
    51	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_BUCKET_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
    52	
    53	  # Basic Configuration
    54	  readonly RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
    55	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
    56	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"
    57	
    58	  # Service Account Prefixes
    59	  readonly RBGC_MASON_PREFIX="mason"
    60	
    61	  # Timeouts
    62	  readonly RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
    63	  readonly RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
    64	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX=7

    66

    76	  readonly RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
    77	  readonly RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"
    78	  readonly RBGC_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL="https://scaleinv.github.io/recipebottle"

    83	  # Service Usage Service Identifiers

    86	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
    87	
    88	  # Email/Domain Assembly
    89	  readonly RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"
    90	
    91	  # API Version Paths
    92	  readonly RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
    93	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
    94	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
    94	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"

    118	  # Ark Artifact Suffixes
    119	  readonly RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE="-image"
```

## **3. `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh`** (Credential path resolution)

```
     1	#!/bin/bash
     2	#
     3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4	#
     5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");

    13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15	# limitations under the License.
    16	#
    17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18	#
    19	# Recipe Bottle Derived Constants - Credential file path resolution
    20	
    21	set -euo pipefail
    22	
    23	# Multiple inclusion detection
    24	test -z "${ZRBDC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbdc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25	ZRBDC_SOURCED=1
    26	
    27	######################################################################
    28	# Internal Functions (zrbdc_*)
    29	
    30	zrbdc_kindle() {
    31	  test -z "${ZRBDC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbdc already kindled"
    32	  zrbrr_sentinel
    33	
    34	  # Ensure secrets directory and role subdirectories exist
    35	  mkdir -p "${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_governor}" \
    36	           "${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_retriever}" \
    37	           "${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_director}" \
    38	    || buc_die "Failed to create secrets directories under: ${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}"
    39	
    40	  # One-shot migration: move old flat rbra-{role}.env to {role}/rbra.env
    41	  local z_mig_role=""
    41	  for z_mig_role in "${RBCC_role_governor}" "${RBCC_role_retriever}" "${RBCC_role_director}"; do
    42	    local z_mig_old="${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/rbra-${z_mig_role}.env"
    43
    43	    local z_mig_new="${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${z_mig_role}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
    44
    44	    if test -f "${z_mig_old}" && ! test -f "${z_mig_new}"; then
    45
    45	      mv "${z_mig_old}" "${z_mig_new}" || buc_die "Failed to migrate: ${z_mig_old} → ${z_mig_new}"
    46
    46	      local z_has_role=0
    47
    47	      local z_mig_line
    48
    48	      while IFS= read -r z_mig_line; do
    49
    49	        case "${z_mig_line}" in RBRA_ROLE=*) z_has_role=1; break ;; esac
    50
    50	      done < "${z_mig_new}"
    51
    51	      if test "${z_has_role}" = "0"; then
    52
    52	        printf 'RBRA_ROLE=%s\n' "${z_mig_role}" >> "${z_mig_new}"
    53
    53	      fi
    54
    54	    fi
    55
    55	  done
    56

    57	  # Derive credential file paths from RBRR_SECRETS_DIR
    58
    58	  readonly RBDC_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE="${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
    59
    59	  readonly RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE="${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
    60

    60	  readonly RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE="${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
    61

    61	  readonly RBDC_PAYOR_RBRO_FILE="${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/rbro-payor.env"
    62

    62	  # Derive full pool resource paths from stem (suffixes match RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER/AIRGAP)
    63

    63	  readonly RBDC_POOL_TETHER="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}/workerPools/${RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM}-tether"
    64

    64	  readonly RBDC_POOL_AIRGAP="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}/workerPools/${RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM}-airgap"
    65

    65	  readonly ZRBDC_KINDLED=1
    66

    66	}
    67

    67	zrbdc_sentinel() {
    68

    68	  test "${ZRBDC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbdc not kindled - call zrbdc_kindle first"
    69

    69	}
    70

    70	# eof
```

```
     1	#!/bin/bash
     2	#

    15	#
    16	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    17	#
    18	# Recipe Bottle GCP Artifact Registry - Implementation
    19	
    20	set -euo pipefail
    21	
    22	# Multiple inclusion detection
    23	test -z "${ZRBGA_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbga multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    24	ZRBGA_SOURCED=1
    25	
    26	######################################################################
    27	# Internal Functions (zrbga_*)
    28	
    29	zrbga_kindle() {
    30	  test -z "${ZRBGA_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbga already kindled"
    30	
    31	  test -n "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"     || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"
    32

    32	  test   "${#RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" -gt 0 || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty"
    33

    33	  buc_log_args "Ensure dependencies are kindled first"
    34

    34	  zrbgc_sentinel
    35

    35	  zrbgo_sentinel
    36

    36	  zrbgu_sentinel
    37

    37	  zrbgi_sentinel
    38

    38	  readonly ZRBGA_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbga_"
    39

    39	  readonly ZRBGA_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGA_PREFIX}empty.json"
    40

    40	  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGA_EMPTY_JSON}"
    41

    41	  # Infix values for HTTP operations
    42

    42	  readonly ZRBGA_INFIX_CREATE_REPO="create_repo"
    43

    43	  readonly ZRBGA_INFIX_VERIFY_REPO="verify_repo"
    43	  readonly ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO="delete_repo"
    44

    44	  readonly ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO="get_repo"
    44

    45

    46	  readonly ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_SET="repo_iam_set"

    47

    48	}

    49	zrbga_sentinel() {
    50

    50	  test "${ZRBGA_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbga not kindled - call zrbga_kindle first"
    50

    51	}
    51

    52	######################################################################
    52

    53	# External Functions (rbga_*)
    53

    54	rbga_repo_create() {
    55

    55	  zrbga_sentinel
    55

    56	  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
    56

    57	  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
    57

    58	  local z_format="${3:-DOCKER}"
    58

    59	  buc_doc_brief "Create an Artifact Registry repository"
    59

    60	  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository to create"
    60

    61	  buc_doc_param "location" "Location for the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
    61

    62	  buc_doc_param "format" "Repository format (optional, defaults to DOCKER)"
    62

    63	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    63

    64	  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
    64

    65	  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
    65

    66	  buc_step "Creating Artifact Registry repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
    66

    67	  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
    67

    68	  local z_token
    68

    69	  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
    69

    70	  local z_parent="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}"
    70

    71	  local z_resource="${z_parent}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
    71

    72	  local z_create_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_parent}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}?repositoryId=${z_repo_name}"
    72

    73	  local z_create_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbga_create_repo_body.json"
    73

    74	  jq -n --arg format "${z_format}" '{format: $format}' > "${z_create_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build create-repo body"
    74

    75	  buc_step "Create ${z_format} format repository"
    75

    76	  rbgu_http_json_lro_ok                                              \
    76

    77	    "Create Artifact Registry repo"                                  \
    77

    78	    "${z_token}"                                                     \
    78

    79	    "${z_create_url}"                                                \
    79

    80	    "${ZRBGA_INFIX_CREATE_REPO}"                                     \
    80

    81	    "${z_create_body}"                                               \
    81

    82	    ".name"                                                          \
    82

    83	    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}"   \
    83

    84	    "${RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL}"                                       \
    84

    85	    "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"                               \
    85

    86	    "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
    86

    87	  buc_success "Repository ${z_repo_name} created in ${z_location}"
    87

    88	}
    88

    89	rbga_repo_get() {
    89

    90	  zrbga_sentinel
    90

    91	  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
    91

    92	  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
    92

    93	  buc_doc_brief "Get Artifact Registry repository details"
    93

    94	  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository to retrieve"
    94

    95	  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
    95

    96	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    96

    97	  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
    97

    98	  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
    98

    99	  buc_step "Getting Artifact Registry repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
    99

   100	  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   100

   101	  local z_token
   101

   102	  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   102

   103	  local z_resource="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
   103

   104	  local z_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}"
   104

   105	  buc_step 'Get repository via REST API'
   105

   106	  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO}"
   106

   107	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Get repository" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO}" 404 "not found"
   107

   108	  local z_http_code
   108

   109	  z_http_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO}")
   109

   110	  if test "${z_http_code}" = "404"; then
   110

   111	    buc_info "Repository not found: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   111

   112	    return 1
   112

   113	  fi
   113

   114	  buc_log_args 'Verify repository format'
   114

   115	  local z_format
   115

   116	  z_format=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO}" '.format') || z_format="UNKNOWN"
   116

   117	  buc_success "Repository found: ${z_repo_name} (format: ${z_format}) in ${z_location}"
   117

   118	  return 0
   118

   119	}
   119

   120	rbga_repo_set_iam() {
   120

   121	  zrbga_sentinel
   121

   122	  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
   122

   123	  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
   123

   124	  local z_policy_json="${3:-}"
   124

   125	  buc_doc_brief "Set IAM policy on an Artifact Registry repository"
   125

   126	  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository"
   126

   127	  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
   127

   128	  buc_doc_param "policy_json" "IAM policy JSON (from file or string)"
   128

   129	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   129

   130	  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
   130

   131	  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
   131

   132	  test -n "${z_policy_json}" || buc_die "Policy JSON required"
   132

   133	  buc_step "Setting IAM policy on repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   133

   134	  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   134

   135	  local z_token
   135

   136	  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   136

   137	  local z_resource="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
   137

   138	  local z_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}:setIamPolicy"
   138

   139	  local z_policy_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbga_repo_set_iam.json"
   139

   140	  if test -f "${z_policy_json}"; then
   140

   141	    jq -n --slurpfile policy "${z_policy_json}" '{ policy: $policy[0] }' > "${z_policy_file}"
   141

   142	  else
   142

   143	    jq -n --argjson policy "${z_policy_json}" '{ policy: $policy }' > "${z_policy_file}"
   143

   144	  fi
   144

   145	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" \
   145

   146	                                  "${ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_SET}" "${z_policy_file}"
   146

   147	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Set repository IAM policy" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_SET}"
   147

   148	  buc_success "IAM policy set on repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   148

   149	}
   149

   150	rbga_repo_add_iam_role() {
   150

   151	  zrbga_sentinel
   151

   152	  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
   152

   153	  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
   153

   154	  local z_member="${3:-}"
   154

   155	  local z_role="${4:-}"
   155

   156	  buc_doc_brief "Add IAM role to a member on an Artifact Registry repository"
   156

   157	  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository"
   157

   158	  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
   158

   159	  buc_doc_param "member" "Member to grant role to (serviceAccount:email or user:email)"
   159

   160	  buc_doc_param "role" "Role to grant (e.g., roles/artifactregistry.reader)"
   160

   161	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   161

   162	  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
   162

   163	  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
   163

   164	  test -n "${z_member}" || buc_die "Member required"
   165

   165	  test -n "${z_role}" || buc_die "Role required"
   165

   166	  buc_step "Adding IAM role ${z_role} to ${z_member} on repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   166

   167	  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   167

   168	  local z_token
   168

   169	  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   169

   170	  # Extract email from member if it's in serviceAccount:email format
   170

   171	  local z_account_email="${z_member}"
   171

   172	  if [[ "${z_member}" =~ ^serviceAccount:(.+)$ ]]; then
   172

   173	    z_account_email="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
   173

   174	  fi
   174

   175	  buc_log_args 'Use rbgi_add_repo_iam_role'
   175

   176	  rbgi_add_repo_iam_role "${z_token}" "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_account_email}" "${z_location}" "${z_repo_name}" "${z_role}"
   176

   177	  buc_success "Added IAM role ${z_role} to ${z_member} on repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   178

   178	}
   178

   179	rbga_repo_delete() {
   179

   180	  zrbga_sentinel
   180

   181	  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
   181

   182	  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
   182

   183	  buc_doc_brief "Delete an Artifact Registry repository"
   183

   184	  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository to delete"
   184

   185	  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
   185

   186	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   186

   187	  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
   187

   188	  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
   188

   189	  buc_step "Deleting Artifact Registry repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   189

   190	  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   190

   191	  local z_token
   191

   192	  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   192

   193	  local z_resource="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
   193

   194	  buc_log_args "Delete Artifact Registry repo '${z_repo_name}' in ${z_location}"
   194

   195	  local z_delete_code
   195

   196	  rbgu_http_json "DELETE"                                                           \
   196

   197	    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}"    \
   197

   198	                            "${z_token}" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO}"
   198

   199	  z_delete_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO}") || z_delete_code="000"
   199

   200	  case "${z_delete_code}" in
   200

   201	    200|204) buc_success "Repository ${z_repo_name} deleted" ;;
   201

   202
    404)     buc_info "Repository ${z_repo_name} not found (already deleted)" ;;
   202

   203
    *)
   203

   204
      local z_err
   204

   205
      z_err=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO}" '.error.message') || z_err="Unknown error"
   205

   206
      buc_die "Failed to delete repository: ${z_err}"
   206

   207
      ;;
   207

   208
  esac
   208

   209
}
   209

   210
# eof
```

---

**Key Findings:**

1. **Triage Entry Point** (`rbw-go.OnboardMAIN.sh`): Minimal wrapper that delegates to `.buk/launcher.rbw_workbench.sh`

2. **RBGC_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL** (line 78 in `rbgc_Constants.sh`): `https://scaleinv.github.io/recipebottle`

3. **Credential Paths** (in `rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh`):
   - Governor role: `${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}`
   - Retriever role: `${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}`
   - Director role: `${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}`
   - Payor: `${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/rbro-payor.env`

4. **GAR Functions** (in `rbga_ArtifactRegistry.sh`): Complete implementations for:
   - `rbga_repo_create()` - Create Artifact Registry repository
   - `rbga_repo_get()` - Get repository details
   - `rbga_repo_set_iam()` - Set IAM policy
   - `rbga_repo_add_iam_role()` - Add IAM role to members
   - `rbga_repo_delete()` - Delete repository
